revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-550

A secondary radiator, or an array of secondary radiators, or a reflecting surface placed behind a primary radiator, an array of primary radiators, or a feed, in order to increase forward and reduce backward radiation from the antenna.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
